            df.exp2_made_children_difference) %>% 
   mutate(response_pattern = case_when(
    direct == 1 & absence == 1 ~ "both",
    direct == 0 & absence == 0 ~ "neither",
    TRUE ~ "different"
  ))
 
df.difference_combined %>% 
  group_by(age, question, response_pattern) %>% 
  summarize(n = n()) %>% 
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(age, question) %>% 
  mutate(percentage = n / sum(n) * 100)
## # A tibble: 18 × 5
## # Groups:   age, question [6]
##    age      question response_pattern     n percentage
##    <chr>    <chr>    <chr>            <int>      <dbl>
##  1 adults   cause    both                29      24.2 
##  2 adults   cause    different           84      70   
##  3 adults   cause    neither              7       5.83
##  4 adults   lexical  both                22       9.17
##  5 adults   lexical  different          195      81.2 
##  6 adults   lexical  neither             23       9.58
##  7 adults   made     both                38      31.7 
##  8 adults   made     different           75      62.5 
##  9 adults   made     neither              7       5.83
## 10 children cause    both                39      13   
## 11 children cause    different          239      79.7 
## 12 children cause    neither             22       7.33
## 13 children lexical  both                36       6   
## 14 children lexical  different          515      85.8 
## 15 children lexical  neither             49       8.17
## 16 children made     both                23       7.67
## 17 children made     different          254      84.7 
## 18 children made     neither             23       7.67

Different Responses Plots

Cause

df.cause_children_differnet = df.exp2_cause_children %>% 
  mutate(response_pattern = case_when(
    direct == 1 & absence == 1 ~ "both",
    direct == 0 & absence == 0 ~ "neither",
    TRUE ~ "different"
  )) %>% 
  filter(response_pattern == "different")



df.model = df.cause_children_differnet %>% 
  mutate(difference = absence - direct,
        difference = recode(difference, `-1` = 0),
        question = str_replace_all(question, "caused", "cause"))


fit.brm.absence_cause.difference = brm(formula = difference ~ 1 + question*age + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario), 
                     data = df.model,
                     family = "bernoulli",
                     seed = 1,
                     iter = 4000,
                     warmup = 1000,
                     control = list(adapt_delta = .9999),
                     file = "cache/absence_cause_difference")


df.data = expand_grid(age = seq(4, 9, 0.1),
                      question = c("cause", "lexical"))

df.prediction = fit.brm.absence_cause.difference %>% 
  fitted(newdata = df.data,
         re_formula = NA,
          probs = c(0.1, 0.9)) %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  bind_cols(df.data) %>% 
  clean_names()


df.adults = df.exp2_cause_adults %>% 
   mutate(response_pattern = case_when(
    direct == 1 & absence == 1 ~ "both",
    direct == 0 & absence == 0 ~ "neither",
    TRUE ~ "different"
  )) %>% 
  filter(response_pattern == "different") %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = rep(10)) %>% 
  mutate(difference = absence - direct,
        difference = recode(difference, `-1` = 0))



df.means = df.model %>% 
  bind_rows(df.adults) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = factor(age_whole, 
                            levels = c(4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10), 
                            labels = c("4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "adults"))) %>% 
  group_by(age_whole, question) %>% 
  summarize(
    response = Hmisc::smean.cl.boot(difference)) %>%
    mutate(index = c("response", "low", "high")) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = index,
                values_from = response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = fct_recode(age_whole, "10" = "adults"),
         age_whole = as.numeric(as.character(age_whole)))



p5 = ggplot(mapping = aes(x = age, 
                     y = difference,
                     color = question)) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(data = df.prediction,
              mapping = aes(y = estimate,
                            ymin = q10,
                            ymax = q90,
                            color = question,
                            fill = question),
              stat = "identity",
              alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df.means,
                  mapping = aes(x = age_whole,
                                y = response,
                                ymin = low,
                                ymax = high,
                                fill = question,
                                shape = question),
                  color = "black",
                  size = 0.5,
                  show.legend = TRUE,
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  ylab("Probability of selecting \n direct or absent cause") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("cause" = "#E41A1C", 
                               "lexical" = "#377EB8")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("cause" = "#E41A1C",
                                "lexical" = "#377EB8")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("cause" = 21, 
                                "lexical" = 23)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
                     labels = c("100% \n proximal", "75%", "50%", "75%", "100% \n distal"),
                     limits = c(0, 1)) +  
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 4:10,
                     labels = c("4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "Adults")) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 18)) + 
  guides(fill = "none",
         color = "none",
         shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = c("#377EB8", "#E41A1C")),
                              reverse = T))

Made

df.made_children_differnet = df.exp2_made_children %>% 
  mutate(response_pattern = case_when(
    direct == 1 & absence == 1 ~ "both",
    direct == 0 & absence == 0 ~ "neither",
    TRUE ~ "different"
  )) %>% 
  filter(response_pattern == "different")

df.model = df.made_children_differnet %>% 
  mutate(difference = absence - direct,
        difference = recode(difference, `-1` = 0),
         age_whole = as.integer(age))


fit.brm.absence_made.difference = brm(formula = difference ~ 1 + question*age + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario), 
                     data = df.model,
                     family = "bernoulli",
                     seed = 1,
                     iter = 4000,
                     warmup = 1000,
                     control = list(adapt_delta = .9999),
                     file = "cache/absence_made_difference")


df.data = expand_grid(age = seq(4, 9, 0.1),
                      question = c("made", "lexical"))

df.prediction = fit.brm.absence_made.difference %>% 
  fitted(newdata = df.data,
         re_formula = NA,
          probs = c(0.1, 0.9)) %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  bind_cols(df.data) %>% 
  clean_names()



df.adults = df.exp2_made_adults %>% 
   mutate(response_pattern = case_when(
    direct == 1 & absence == 1 ~ "both",
    direct == 0 & absence == 0 ~ "neither",
    TRUE ~ "different"
  )) %>% 
  filter(response_pattern == "different") %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = rep(10)) %>% 
  mutate(difference = absence - direct,
        difference = recode(difference, `-1` = 0))



df.means = df.model %>% 
  bind_rows(df.adults) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = factor(age_whole, 
                            levels = c(4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10), 
                            labels = c("4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "adults"))) %>% 
  group_by(age_whole, question) %>% 
  summarize(
    response = Hmisc::smean.cl.boot(difference)) %>%
    mutate(index = c("response", "low", "high")) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = index,
                values_from = response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = fct_recode(age_whole, "10" = "adults"),
         age_whole = as.numeric(as.character(age_whole)))




p6 = ggplot(mapping = aes(x = age,
                     y = difference,
                     color = question)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(data = df.prediction,
              mapping = aes(y = estimate,
                            ymin = q10,
                            ymax = q90,
                            color = question,
                            fill = question),
              stat = "identity",
              alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df.means,
                  mapping = aes(x = age_whole,
                                y = response,
                                ymin = low,
                                ymax = high,
                                fill = question,
                                shape = question),
                  color = "black",
                  size = 0.5,
                  show.legend = TRUE,
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("made" = "#4DAF4A", 
                               "lexical" = "#377EB8"),
                    breaks = c("made",
                               "lexical")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("made" = "#4DAF4A",
                                "lexical" = "#377EB8"),
                     breaks= c("made", "lexical")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("made" = 21, 
                                "lexical" = 23)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
                     labels = c("100% \n proximal", "75%", "50%", "75%", "100% \n distal"),
                     limits = c(0, 1)) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 4:10,
                     labels = c("4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "Adults")) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 18)) +
  guides(fill = "none",
         color = "none",
         shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = c("#377EB8", "#4DAF4A"))))

Combine Cause and Made Plots

plot = p5 + p6 + 
plot_layout(nrow = 1) &
plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold"))

ggsave(plot, filename = "../../figures/experiment2/absence_different.pdf", height = 5, width = 12)

plot

All Responses Plots

Cause

df.model = df.exp2_cause_children %>% 
  mutate(question = as_factor(question),
         question = fct_relevel(question, "caused"))

# removed random intercepts for scenario to avoid divergent transition errors
fit.brm.present.cause.age2 = brm(formula = direct ~ 1 + question*age + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario), 
                     data = df.model,
                     family = "bernoulli",
                     seed = 1,
                     iter = 6000,
                     warmup = 1000,
                     control = list(adapt_delta = .999999,
                                    max_treedepth = 15),
                     file = "cache/fit.brm.present.cause.age2") 



fit.brm.absence.cause.age2 = brm(formula = absence ~ 1 + question*age + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario),
                      data = df.model,
                      family = "bernoulli",
                      seed = 1,
                      iter = 6000,
                      warmup = 1000,
                      control = list(adapt_delta = .999999,
                                     max_treedepth = 15),
                      file = "cache/fit.brm.absence.cause.age2") 



df.data = expand_grid(age = seq(4, 9, 0.1),
                      question = c("caused", "lexical"))

df.prediction = fit.brm.present.cause.age2 %>% 
  fitted(newdata = df.data,
         re_formula = NA,
          probs = c(0.1, 0.9)) %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  bind_cols(df.data) %>% 
  mutate(type = "presence") %>% 
  bind_rows(fit.brm.absence.cause.age2 %>% 
              fitted(newdata = df.data,
                     re_formula = NA,
                     probs = c(0.1, 0.9)) %>% 
              as_tibble() %>% 
              bind_cols(df.data) %>% 
              mutate(type = "absence")) %>% 
  clean_names()

df.adults = df.exp2_cause_adults %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = rep(10)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = (direct:absence),
    names_to = "type",
    values_to = "response")



df.children = df.exp2_cause_children%>%
  select(-response) %>% 
 pivot_longer(cols = (direct:absence),
               names_to = "type",
               values_to = "response")

df.means = df.children %>% 
  bind_rows(df.adults) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = factor(age_whole, 
                            levels = c(4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10), 
                            labels = c("4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "adults")),
         question = recode(question, "cause" = "caused"),
         type = recode(type, "direct" = "presence")) %>% 
  group_by(age_whole, question, type) %>% 
  summarize(
    response = Hmisc::smean.cl.boot(response)) %>%
    mutate(index = c("response", "low", "high")) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = index,
                values_from = response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = fct_recode(age_whole, "10" = "adults"),
         age_whole = as.numeric(as.character(age_whole)))



custom_labels = as_labeller(c("absence" = "Absent Cause", "presence" = "Direct Cause"))

p7 = ggplot(mapping = aes(x = age, 
                     y = response,
                     color = question)) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.50, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(data = df.prediction,
              mapping = aes(y = estimate,
                            ymin = q10,
                            ymax = q90,
                            color = question,
                            fill = question),
              stat = "identity",
              alpha = 0.2,
              show.legend = F) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df.means,
                  mapping = aes(x = age_whole,
                                y = response,
                                ymin = low,
                                ymax = high,
                                fill = question,
                                shape = question),
                  color = "black",
                  size = 0.5,
                  show.legend = TRUE,
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.5)) +
    facet_wrap(~type,
             labeller = custom_labels) + 
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set1") + 
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set1") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 23)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
                      labels = str_c(seq(0, 1, 0.25) * 100, "%")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 4:10,
                     labels = c("4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "Adults")) +
  labs(y = "Probability of selecting \n causal candidate") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 18)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE),
         fill = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE),
         shape = guide_legend(reverse = TRUE))

Made

df.model = df.exp2_made_children %>% 
  mutate(question = as_factor(question),
         question = fct_relevel(question, "made"))


fit.brm.present.made.age2 = brm(formula = direct ~ 1 + question*age + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario), 
                     data = df.model,
                     family = "bernoulli",
                     seed = 1,
                     iter = 8000,
                     warmup = 1000,
                     control = list(adapt_delta = .999999,
                                    max_treedepth = 15),
                     file = "cache/fit.brm.present.made.age2") 



fit.brm.absence.made.age2 = brm(formula = absence ~ 1 + question*age + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario),
                      data = df.model,
                      family = "bernoulli",
                      seed = 1,
                      iter = 6000,
                      control = list(adapt_delta = .999999,
                                     max_treedepth = 15),
                      file = "cache/fit.brm.absence.made.age2") 



df.data = expand_grid(age = seq(4, 9, 0.1),
                      question = c("made", "lexical"))

df.prediction = fit.brm.present.made.age2 %>% 
  fitted(newdata = df.data,
         re_formula = NA,
          probs = c(0.1, 0.9)) %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  bind_cols(df.data) %>% 
  mutate(type = "presence") %>% 
  bind_rows(fit.brm.absence.made.age2 %>% 
              fitted(newdata = df.data,
                     re_formula = NA,
                     probs = c(0.1, 0.9)) %>% 
              as_tibble() %>% 
              bind_cols(df.data) %>% 
              mutate(type = "absence")) %>% 
  clean_names()

df.adults = df.exp2_made_adults %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = rep(10)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = (direct:absence),
    names_to = "type",
    values_to = "response")


df.children = df.exp2_made_children %>%
  select(-response) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = (direct:absence),
               names_to = "type",
               values_to = "response")

df.means = df.children %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = as.integer(age)) %>%
  bind_rows(df.adults) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = factor(age_whole, 
                            levels = c(4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9, 10), 
                            labels = c("4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "adults")),
         type = recode(type, "direct" = "presence")) %>% 
  group_by(age_whole, question, type) %>% 
  summarize(
    response = Hmisc::smean.cl.boot(response)) %>%
    mutate(index = c("response", "low", "high")) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = index,
                values_from = response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = fct_recode(age_whole, "10" = "adults"),
         age_whole = as.numeric(as.character(age_whole)),
         question = factor(question, levels = c("made", "lexical")))


custom_labels = as_labeller(c("absence" = "Absent Cause", "presence" = "Direct Cause"))


p8 = ggplot(mapping = aes(x = age, 
                     y = response,
                     color = question)) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.50, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(data = df.prediction,
              mapping = aes(y = estimate,
                            ymin = q10,
                            ymax = q90,
                            color = question,
                            fill = question),
              stat = "identity",
              alpha = 0.2,
              show.legend = F) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df.means,
                  mapping = aes(x = age_whole,
                                y = response,
                                ymin = low,
                                ymax = high,
                                fill = question,
                                shape = question),
                  color = "black",
                  size = 0.5,
                  show.legend = TRUE,
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.4)) +
  facet_wrap(~type,
             labeller = custom_labels) + 
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("made" = "#4DAF4A", "lexical" = "#377EB8"), breaks=c("made", "lexical")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("made" = "#4DAF4A", "lexical" = "#377EB8"), breaks=c("made", "lexical")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 23), breaks=c("made", "lexical")) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
                     labels = str_c(seq(0, 1, 0.25) * 100, "%"),
                     limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 4:10,
                     labels = c("4", "5", "6", "7", "8", "9", "Adults")) +
  labs(y = "Probability of selecting \n causal candidate") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 18))

Combine Cause and Made Plots

plot = p7 + p8 + 
plot_layout(nrow = 1) &
plot_annotation(tag_levels = "A") &
theme(plot.tag = element_text(face = "bold"))

ggsave(plot, filename = "../../figures/experiment2/absence_all.pdf", height = 5, width = 18)

plot

EXPERIMENT 3: ABSENCES

EXPLANATION

ADULTS

DATA

Read in data
df.exp3_adults = read_csv("../../data/experiment3/adults/exp3_adults.csv")

Wrangle

# clean responses
df.exp3_adults = df.exp3_adults %>% 
  mutate(condition = str_extract(string = responses,
                                 pattern = "sunburn_simple_response|sunburn_made_response|flood_simple_response|flood_made_response"),
         response = str_extract(string = responses, 
                                pattern = ":(.*)"),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\""),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = ":"),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\}"),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\."),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\,"),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\\\n"),
         response = str_to_lower(response)) %>% 
  separate(condition, c("scenario", "question", "extra"), "_") %>% 
  rename(participant = workerid) %>% 
  select(participant, scenario, question, response)

# code responses
df.exp3_adults = df.exp3_adults %>%
  mutate(direct = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                    "^sun$|sun | sun$"), 1, 0),
         direct = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                    "^water$|water | water$"), 1, direct),
         direct = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                    "^rain$|rain | rain$"), 1, direct),
         absence = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                     "^sunscreen$|sunscreen | sunscreen$"), 1, 0),
         absence = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                     "^window$|window | window$"), 1, absence),
         absence = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                     "^latch$|latch | latch$"), 1, absence))

Demographics

df.exp3_adults_demo = read_csv("../../data/experiment3/adults/exp3_adults_demo.csv")

df.exp3_adults_demo %>% 
  summarise(age_mean = mean(as.numeric(age), na.rm = TRUE))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   age_mean
##      <dbl>
## 1     33.8
df.exp3_adults_demo %>% 
  summarise(age_sd = sd(as.numeric(age), na.rm = TRUE))
## # A tibble: 1 × 1
##   age_sd
##    <dbl>
## 1   12.3
df.exp3_adults_demo %>% 
  group_by(gender) %>% 
  count() 
## # A tibble: 4 × 2
## # Groups:   gender [4]
##   gender         n
##   <chr>      <int>
## 1 Female        10
## 2 Male          16
## 3 Non-binary     3
## 4 <NA>           1
df.exp3_adults_demo %>% 
  group_by(race) %>% 
  count() 
## # A tibble: 4 × 2
## # Groups:   race [4]
##   race                       n
##   <chr>                  <int>
## 1 Asian                      6
## 2 Black/African American     3
## 3 White                     20
## 4 <NA>                       1
df.exp3_adults_demo %>% 
  group_by(ethnicity) %>% 
  count() 
## # A tibble: 3 × 2
## # Groups:   ethnicity [3]
##   ethnicity        n
##   <chr>        <int>
## 1 Hispanic         1
## 2 Non-Hispanic    27
## 3 <NA>             2

STATS

Bayesian Model
# dummy coding
options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment", "contr.poly"))

df.model = df.exp3_adults %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = direct:absence,
               names_to = "causal_candidate",
               values_to = "response") %>% 
mutate(causal_candidate = factor(causal_candidate, levels = c("direct", "absence")))

# check levels of causal_candidate
contrasts(df.model$causal_candidate)
##         absence
## direct        0
## absence       1
fit.brm.exp = brm(formula = response ~ 1 + causal_candidate + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario), 
                     data = df.model,
                     family = "bernoulli",
                     seed = 1,
                     iter = 4000,
                     warmup = 1000,
                     control = list(adapt_delta = .999999),
                     file = "cache/explanation_adult") 
fit.brm.exp
##  Family: bernoulli 
##   Links: mu = logit 
## Formula: response ~ 1 + causal_candidate + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario) 
##    Data: df.model (Number of observations: 120) 
##   Draws: 4 chains, each with iter = 4000; warmup = 1000; thin = 1;
##          total post-warmup draws = 12000
## 
## Multilevel Hyperparameters:
## ~participant (Number of levels: 30) 
##               Estimate Est.Error l-95% CI u-95% CI Rhat Bulk_ESS Tail_ESS
## sd(Intercept)     0.51      0.38     0.02     1.40 1.00     4995     5608
## 
## ~scenario (Number of levels: 2) 
##               Estimate Est.Error l-95% CI u-95% CI Rhat Bulk_ESS Tail_ESS
## sd(Intercept)     1.06      1.20     0.03     4.25 1.00     4514     6628
## 
## Regression Coefficients:
##                         Estimate Est.Error l-95% CI u-95% CI Rhat Bulk_ESS
## Intercept                  -1.23      0.92    -3.37     0.50 1.00     6208
## causal_candidateabsence     4.02      0.67     2.80     5.43 1.00    18155
##                         Tail_ESS
## Intercept                   4568
## causal_candidateabsence     8785
## 
## Draws were sampled using sampling(NUTS). For each parameter, Bulk_ESS
## and Tail_ESS are effective sample size measures, and Rhat is the potential
## scale reduction factor on split chains (at convergence, Rhat = 1).

CHILDREN

DATA

Read in Data
df.exp3_children = read_csv("../../data/experiment3/children/exp3_children.csv")
Wrangle
# clean data
df.exp3_children = df.exp3_children %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  rename(response_1 = full_response_11,
         response_2 = full_response_13) %>% 
  select(participant_number, rounded_age, scenario_1, scenario_2, response_1, response_2, gender, lan_spoken) %>%
  drop_na() %>% 
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(-participant_number, -rounded_age, -gender, -lan_spoken),
    names_to = c(".value"),
    names_pattern = "(^scenario|^response)"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\""),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = ":"),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\("),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\)"),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\}"),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\."),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\,"),
         response = str_remove_all(string = response,
                                   pattern = "\\\\n"),
         response = str_to_lower(response))

# code responses
df.exp3_children = df.exp3_children %>%
  mutate(direct = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                    "^sun$|sun | sun$"), 1, 0),
         direct = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                    "^water$|water | water$"), 1, direct),
         direct = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                    "^rain$|rain | rain$"), 1, direct),
         absence = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                     "^sunscreen$|sunscreen | sunscreen$"), 1, 0),
         absence = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                     "^window$|window | window$"), 1, absence),
         absence = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                     "^windows$|windows | windows$"), 1, absence),
         absence = ifelse(str_detect(response,
                                     "^latch$|latch | latch$"), 1, absence),
         age = round(rounded_age / 365, digits = 2)) %>% 
  rename(participant = participant_number)
Demographics
 # gender
df.exp3_children %>%
  group_by(gender) %>%
  summarise(n = n_distinct(participant)) %>%
  print()
## # A tibble: 2 × 2
##   gender     n
##   <chr>  <int>
## 1 female    52
## 2 male      37
  # language spoken
df.exp3_children %>%
    mutate(en_occurrence = ifelse(str_detect(lan_spoken, "en"), "en", "non-en")) %>%
    group_by(en_occurrence) %>%
    summarise(n = n_distinct(participant)) %>%
    print()
## # A tibble: 1 × 2
##   en_occurrence     n
##   <chr>         <int>
## 1 en               89

STATS

Bayesian Model
# dummy coding
options(contrasts = c("contr.treatment", "contr.poly"))

df.model = df.exp3_children %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = direct:absence,
               names_to = "causal_candidate",
               values_to = "response") %>% 
  mutate(causal_candidate = factor(causal_candidate, levels = c("direct", "absence")))


# check levels of causal_candidate
contrasts(df.model$causal_candidate)
##         absence
## direct        0
## absence       1
# removed random intercepts for scenario to avoid divergent transition errors
fit.brm.exp = brm(formula = response ~ 1 + causal_candidate + (1 | participant), 
                     data = df.model,
                     family = "bernoulli",
                     seed = 1,
                     iter = 4000,
                     warmup = 1000,
                     control = list(adapt_delta = .999999),
                     file = "cache/explanation_children") 
fit.brm.exp
##  Family: bernoulli 
##   Links: mu = logit 
## Formula: response ~ 1 + causal_candidate + (1 | participant) 
##    Data: df.model (Number of observations: 360) 
##   Draws: 4 chains, each with iter = 4000; warmup = 1000; thin = 1;
##          total post-warmup draws = 12000
## 
## Multilevel Hyperparameters:
## ~participant (Number of levels: 90) 
##               Estimate Est.Error l-95% CI u-95% CI Rhat Bulk_ESS Tail_ESS
## sd(Intercept)     0.14      0.10     0.01     0.38 1.00     8236     5583
## 
## Regression Coefficients:
##                         Estimate Est.Error l-95% CI u-95% CI Rhat Bulk_ESS
## Intercept                  -1.48      0.19    -1.87    -1.11 1.00    19596
## causal_candidateabsence     2.47      0.26     1.98     2.99 1.00    19464
##                         Tail_ESS
## Intercept                   8603
## causal_candidateabsence     8681
## 
## Draws were sampled using sampling(NUTS). For each parameter, Bulk_ESS
## and Tail_ESS are effective sample size measures, and Rhat is the potential
## scale reduction factor on split chains (at convergence, Rhat = 1).

PLOTS

Explanation
df.model = df.exp3_children %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = direct:absence,
               names_to = "causal_candidate",
               values_to = "response") %>% 
  mutate(causal_candidate = factor(causal_candidate, levels = c("direct", "absence")))




fit.brm.explanation = brm(formula = response ~ 1 + causal_candidate*age + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario),
                     data = df.model,
                     family = "bernoulli",
                     seed = 1,
                     iter = 6000,
                     warmup = 1000,
                     control = list(adapt_delta = .999999),
                     file = "cache/explanation_children_age") 


fit.brm.explanation
##  Family: bernoulli 
##   Links: mu = logit 
## Formula: response ~ 1 + causal_candidate * age + (1 | participant) + (1 | scenario) 
##    Data: df.model (Number of observations: 360) 
##   Draws: 4 chains, each with iter = 6000; warmup = 1000; thin = 1;
##          total post-warmup draws = 20000
## 
## Multilevel Hyperparameters:
## ~participant (Number of levels: 90) 
##               Estimate Est.Error l-95% CI u-95% CI Rhat Bulk_ESS Tail_ESS
## sd(Intercept)     0.14      0.11     0.00     0.40 1.00    13969     9708
## 
## ~scenario (Number of levels: 2) 
##               Estimate Est.Error l-95% CI u-95% CI Rhat Bulk_ESS Tail_ESS
## sd(Intercept)     0.82      1.06     0.01     3.77 1.00     5653     9677
## 
## Regression Coefficients:
##                       Estimate Est.Error l-95% CI u-95% CI Rhat Bulk_ESS
## Intercept                -1.00      1.12    -3.18     1.18 1.00    12830
## causal_candidate1         1.72      0.83     0.06     3.34 1.00    19674
## age                       0.15      0.16    -0.17     0.46 1.00    29347
## causal_candidate1:age    -0.55      0.16    -0.86    -0.25 1.00    19460
##                       Tail_ESS
## Intercept                 9342
## causal_candidate1        14220
## age                      14628
## causal_candidate1:age    14780
## 
## Draws were sampled using sampling(NUTS). For each parameter, Bulk_ESS
## and Tail_ESS are effective sample size measures, and Rhat is the potential
## scale reduction factor on split chains (at convergence, Rhat = 1).
df.data = expand_grid(age = seq(4, 6, 0.1),
                      causal_candidate = c("direct", "absence"))

df.prediction = fit.brm.explanation %>% 
  fitted(newdata = df.data,
         re_formula = NA,
          probs = c(0.1, 0.9)) %>% 
  as_tibble() %>% 
  bind_cols(df.data) %>% 
  clean_names() %>% 
  rename(type = causal_candidate) %>% 
  mutate(type = ifelse(type == "direct", "direct", "absent"))

df.adults = df.exp3_adults %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = rep(7)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = (direct:absence),
    names_to = "type",
    values_to = "response")


df.children = df.exp3_children %>% 
  select(-response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = as.integer(age)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(cols = (direct:absence),
    names_to = "type",
    values_to = "response")


df.means = df.children %>% 
  bind_rows(df.adults) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = factor(age_whole, 
                            levels = c(4, 5, 6, 7), 
                            labels = c("4", "5", "6","adults"))) %>% 
  group_by(age_whole, question, type) %>% 
  summarize(
    response = Hmisc::smean.cl.boot(response)) %>%
    mutate(index = c("response", "low", "high")) %>%
    ungroup() %>% 
    pivot_wider(names_from = index,
                values_from = response) %>% 
  mutate(age_whole = fct_recode(age_whole, "7" = "adults"),
         age_whole = as.numeric(as.character(age_whole)),
         type = ifelse(type == "direct", "direct", "absent"))




ggplot(mapping = aes(x = age, 
                     y = response,
                     color = type)) + 
  geom_hline(yintercept=0.50, linetype="dashed", color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(data = df.prediction,
              mapping = aes(y = estimate,
                            ymin = q10,
                            ymax = q90,
                            color = type,
                            fill = type),
              stat = "identity",
              alpha = 0.2) +
  geom_pointrange(data = df.means,
                  mapping = aes(x = age_whole,
                                y = response,
                                ymin = low,
                                ymax = high,
                                fill = type,
                                shape = type),
                  color = "black",
                  size = 0.5,
                  show.legend = TRUE,
                  alpha = 0.8,
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("direct" = "#FF7F00", 
                               "absent" = "#984EA3"),
                    breaks = c("direct",
                               "absent")) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("direct" = "#FF7F00", 
                                "absent" = "#984EA3"),
                     breaks= c("direct",
                               "absent")) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c("absent" = 21, 
                                "direct" = 23)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.25),
                     labels = str_c(seq(0, 1, 0.25) * 100, "%"),
                     limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 4:7,
                     labels = c("4", "5", "6", "Adults")) +
  labs(y = "Probability of selecting \n causal candidate") +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        text = element_text(size = 18)) +
  guides(fill = "none",
         color = "none",
         shape = guide_legend(override.aes = list(fill = c("#FF7F00", "#984EA3")),
                              reverse = T))

ggsave("../../figures/experiment3/explanation.pdf", height = 4, width = 5)
